---
title: "Development Podcast Round-up"
author: Greg Brooks
date: 04/21/2026
draft: true
categories:
    - Industry Commentary
    - Free resources
    - Industry media
    - Podcasts
execute: 
  enabled: true
  error: true
---

I am a podcast fanatic, though usually for more entertaining fare than fundraising. In any case, these are some reviews/reactions/highlights of podcasts in the fundraising, advancement, and development space!

# Notes & Highlights
::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Tangent...
Someone on PRSPCT-L posted about the Aspire Research Group's [list of resources](https://www.protopage.com/prospectresearch#Top_Aspire_Picks), which is a somewhat messy, but also rich vein to explore. They are using a tool called Protopage, which struck me as hailing from a different era of the internet, and indeed, [it actually is - circa 2005](https://www.protopage.com/). Kudos to Protopage for resisting ensloppification after all these years. You love to see it. Anyway, I plan on working through as much of that list as I can, to learn about new tools.
:::






***
# Table of Podcast Links
::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Click to expand

```{=html}
<iframe
  src="https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vRYwLehNfbyE2RH22vxmSTuY_4aA5GeEllb392dqq8mhzzD7KEHN10H5c78CUFBSBI8pHKOUEgKqhAo/pubhtml?widget=true&amp;headers=false"
  width="100%"
  height="600"
  frameborder="2">
</iframe>
```

:::
